channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Burnt out bikes, 21st July
item.description:
Burnt out bikes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Water Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags dumped next to bin, 21st July
item.description:
Bags dumped next to overflowing bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolwich Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding needed on Ulverscroft Road and surrounding side streets, 21st July
item.description:
Weeds are getting out of control and no weeding seems to have been done since the winter. Saplings growing near tree trunks also an issue as blocks path/pavement. Please advise your gardening team. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Ulverscroft Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st July
item.description:
Continual fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Headcorn Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 112 Brondesbury villas, 21st July
item.description:
See photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Scaffolding and builders rubbish in alleyway between houses, 21st July
item.description:
Huge amount of scaffolding poles and builders rubbish between houses in alleyway. Close to 43 Ulverscroft Road. Ongoing problem.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Ulverscroft Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in underpass, 21st July
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a bed frame in the subway
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Cambridge Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 2 Wellington Gardens, 21st July
item.description:
Disgusting mess: Six+ bin bags ripped open with food waste splattered all over the pavement and in the gutters. overflowing litter bin. No cleansing here for weeks so please deal pronto.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping near junction of Wellington Gardens and Wellington Mews, 21st July
item.description:
Mattress dumped opposite 70 Wellington Gardens. Lots of cardboard squashed around street tree near garages fronting wellington Gardens. Was reported on Saturday but no action yet by RBG.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Mews, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned electric bike left outside my house, 21st July
item.description:
Someone has left an electric bike outside my house leaning against the fence. It must have been left there late last night. The number is 22926 and has Octopus Energy on it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, North Cray Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned and untaxed car, 21st July
item.description:
Abandoned and untaxed car parked in a bay belonging to residents
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selkirk Drive, North End, Greater London

item.title: Anson Road and Sheldon toad, 21st July
item.description:
Sweeping please!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anson Road, London

item.title: Bed base and gas canisters, 21st July
item.description:

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st July
item.description:
Fly tipping happening constantly, after clearing away yesterday the 20th of July , more rubbish has appeared.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kimbolton Close, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trailer, tyres and bbqs, 21st July
item.description:
Dumped trailer, tyres, garden equipment and general waste behind bushes. Historic problem preventing alley access

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Campbell Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black shelf cabinet left at the top of Lacon road, 21st July
item.description:
It is blocking the pavement making it harder for people with buggies, wheelchairs and walking aids harder to walk pass. It has been there for weeks. It is a black shelf unit down the side of the property number 16 north cross road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Lacon Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st July
item.description:
Junk left outside someone’s house, can it be cleared please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): County Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
